name: Atterax
description: A multi-bladed whip that is adept at flaying skin from bone. In extreme cases, disobedient Grineer are sentenced to death by Atterax.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: A multi-bladed whip that is adept at flaying skin from bone. In extreme cases, disobedient Grineer are sentenced to death by Atterax.

components.name: Polymer Bundle
components.description:
A hard, thermoplastic casing. Manufactured by Corpus.

Location: Mercury, Venus, and Uranus

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Update 29.10.0: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error when returning to the Orbiter while someone in the squad has an Atterax.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Atterax staying awkwardly unraveled several seconds after quick melee attacks.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.10.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Atterax not returning to its holstered state after its first use.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.6.0 + 19.6.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Atterax floating away from your Warframe at the start of a mission.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue with the Atterax whip not extending.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.7.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Atterax not animating when viewed in the arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.7.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Made several audio tweaks to Atterax, the Liset engine and Sprag & Ven'kra.
Fixed an issue where Atterax would continue to spin/play idle sounds while on the players back if it was interrupted when using quick melee.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.7.0: Operation Gate Crash!
patchlogs.fixes: New Atterax! A vicious Grineer whip adept at flaying skin from bone. In extreme cases disobedient Grineer have been sentenced to death by Atterax.
